examples: The Shengliqiao pluton in the western Kunlun Mountains is a composite batholith.
The Shuanghe pluton is S-type granite and formed in the zone of the intercontinental collision.
Yongtai stratigraphic sequence is a complex pluton, which is composed of 4 plutonic masses and 48 intrusives.
It's not even a pluton but a real honest to goodness planet-planet, sitting right between Mars and Jupiter.
Opening with "Pluto, " an ode to the "overthrown" planet (and closing with "Pluton, " a French re-imagining of the song), the record makes its cheekiness immediately apparent.
